name: team-cli-consultant
description: Team marketplace for the CLI Consultants plugin (Codex + Gemini second-opinion review flow).

plugins.name: cli-consultants
plugins.description: Three-channel review flow: Codex + optional Gemini + Plan-subagent. Operational policy and setup tooling. Codex-only-plus-Plan mode automatically fills the second-voice slot via Plan-subagent when Gemini is not installed.
